name: PostgreSQL native process
description: PostgreSQL database server using installed PostgreSQL binaries and a native local process.

env.name: BUS_POSTGRES_BIN
env.description: Directory containing native PostgreSQL server binaries such as postgres and initdb.

env.name: PGDATA
env.description: Data directory used by the native PostgreSQL process.

env.name: BUS_POSTGRES_PORT
env.description: TCP port for the native PostgreSQL listener.

env.name: BUS_POSTGRES_SOCKET_DIR
env.description: Unix socket directory for the native PostgreSQL process. Defaults to /tmp for unprivileged process-level stacks.

env.name: LANG
env.description: Locale used by PostgreSQL initialization and runtime.

env.name: LC_ALL
env.description: Locale category override used by PostgreSQL initialization and runtime.

env.name: PATH
env.description: Command lookup path used by PostgreSQL helper binaries such as initdb.
